title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 265.510 - Violation, penalty for
text:
265.510.  Violation, penalty for. — An intentional violation of the provisions of sections 265.500 to 265.515 by any person or persons sampling grain for the purpose of determining the price thereof shall be deemed a misdemeanor and, upon conviction, shall be fined a sum not to exceed five hundred dollars.
(L. 1975 S.B. 57 § 4)
